MERGE (camp_1:Campaign {name: 'WhatsApp phishing campaign'})
ON CREATE SET camp_1.summary = 'WhatsApp phishing campaign delivering a malicious APK that installs a fake banking/KYC app to steal sensitive information and send it to C2 and an attacker-controlled phone number via SMS.'
ON MATCH SET camp_1.summary = CASE WHEN camp_1.summary IS NULL OR camp_1.summary = '' THEN 'WhatsApp phishing campaign delivering a malicious APK that installs a fake banking/KYC app to steal sensitive information and send it to C2 and an attacker-controlled phone number via SMS.' ELSE camp_1.summary END
MERGE (inc_1:Incident {id: 'whatsapp-phishing-banking-trojan-telemetry'})
ON CREATE SET inc_1.type = 'intrusion', inc_1.summary = 'Telemetry observed a WhatsApp phishing campaign in which an attacker shares a malicious APK posing as a bank KYC app; interaction installs a fraudulent app that collects sensitive information and sends it to C2 and a hard-coded phone number via SMS.'
ON MATCH SET
  inc_1.type = CASE WHEN inc_1.type IS NULL OR inc_1.type = '' THEN 'intrusion' ELSE inc_1.type END,
  inc_1.summary = CASE WHEN inc_1.summary IS NULL OR inc_1.summary = '' THEN 'Telemetry observed a WhatsApp phishing campaign in which an attacker shares a malicious APK posing as a bank KYC app; interaction installs a fraudulent app that collects sensitive information and sends it to C2 and a hard-coded phone number via SMS.' ELSE inc_1.summary END
MERGE (camp_1)-[:includes]->(inc_1)
MERGE (tech_1:Technique {technique_id: 'T1566'})
ON CREATE SET tech_1.name = 'Phishing', tech_1.tactic = 'Initial Access', tech_1.summary = 'Phishing via messaging platform delivering a malicious APK.'
ON MATCH SET
  tech_1.name = CASE WHEN tech_1.name IS NULL OR tech_1.name = '' THEN 'Phishing' ELSE tech_1.name END,
  tech_1.tactic = CASE WHEN tech_1.tactic IS NULL OR tech_1.tactic = '' THEN 'Initial Access' ELSE tech_1.tactic END,
  tech_1.summary = CASE WHEN tech_1.summary IS NULL OR tech_1.summary = '' THEN 'Phishing via messaging platform delivering a malicious APK.' ELSE tech_1.summary END
MERGE (inc_1)-[r_ut_1:used_technique]->(tech_1)
ON CREATE SET r_ut_1.phase = 'Initial Access', r_ut_1.details = 'WhatsApp phishing message delivering a malicious APK and prompting users to enter sensitive info'
ON MATCH SET
  r_ut_1.phase = CASE WHEN r_ut_1.phase IS NULL OR r_ut_1.phase = '' THEN 'Initial Access' ELSE r_ut_1.phase END,
  r_ut_1.details = CASE WHEN r_ut_1.details IS NULL OR r_ut_1.details = '' THEN 'WhatsApp phishing message delivering a malicious APK and prompting users to enter sensitive info' ELSE r_ut_1.details END
MERGE (tool_1:Tool {name: 'WhatsApp'})
ON CREATE SET tool_1.summary = 'Messaging platform used to distribute a malicious APK in a phishing campaign.'
ON MATCH SET tool_1.summary = CASE WHEN tool_1.summary IS NULL OR tool_1.summary = '' THEN 'Messaging platform used to distribute a malicious APK in a phishing campaign.' ELSE tool_1.summary END
MERGE (inc_1)-[r_it_1:involved_tool]->(tool_1)
ON CREATE SET r_it_1.evidence = 'Attacker shares a malicious APK file through WhatsApp with a message asking users to enter sensitive information.'
ON MATCH SET r_it_1.evidence = CASE WHEN r_it_1.evidence IS NULL OR r_it_1.evidence = '' THEN 'Attacker shares a malicious APK file through WhatsApp with a message asking users to enter sensitive information.' ELSE r_it_1.evidence END
MERGE (mal_1:Malware {name: 'Fake bank KYC APK banking trojan'})
ON CREATE SET mal_1.family = 'Banking trojan', mal_1.summary = 'Malicious Android APK installs a fraudulent app impersonating a legitimate bank KYC application to steal sensitive information and exfiltrate it to C2 and a hard-coded phone number via SMS.'
ON MATCH SET
  mal_1.family = CASE WHEN mal_1.family IS NULL OR mal_1.family = '' THEN 'Banking trojan' ELSE mal_1.family END,
  mal_1.summary = CASE WHEN mal_1.summary IS NULL OR mal_1.summary = '' THEN 'Malicious Android APK installs a fraudulent app impersonating a legitimate bank KYC application to steal sensitive information and exfiltrate it to C2 and a hard-coded phone number via SMS.' ELSE mal_1.summary END
MERGE (inc_1)-[r_im_1:involved_malware]->(mal_1)
ON CREATE SET r_im_1.evidence = 'The APK file was malicious; interacting with it installs a fraudulent application that impersonates a legitimate bank KYC app and sends submitted sensitive information to C2 and a hard-coded phone number via SMS.'
ON MATCH SET r_im_1.evidence = CASE WHEN r_im_1.evidence IS NULL OR r_im_1.evidence = '' THEN 'The APK file was malicious; interacting with it installs a fraudulent application that impersonates a legitimate bank KYC app and sends submitted sensitive information to C2 and a hard-coded phone number via SMS.' ELSE r_im_1.evidence END
MERGE (c2_1:C2_Infrastructure {service: 'C2 server'})
ON CREATE SET c2_1.summary = 'Command-and-control server receiving stolen victim information from the fraudulent banking/KYC app.'
ON MATCH SET c2_1.summary = CASE WHEN c2_1.summary IS NULL OR c2_1.summary = '' THEN 'Command-and-control server receiving stolen victim information from the fraudulent banking/KYC app.' ELSE c2_1.summary END
MERGE (mal_1)-[r_ab_1:abuses]->(c2_1)
ON CREATE SET r_ab_1.evidence = 'Stolen information is sent to a command and control (C2) server.'
ON MATCH SET r_ab_1.evidence = CASE WHEN r_ab_1.evidence IS NULL OR r_ab_1.evidence = '' THEN 'Stolen information is sent to a command and control (C2) server.' ELSE r_ab_1.evidence END
MERGE (c2_2:C2_Infrastructure {service: 'SMS exfiltration (hard-coded phone number)'})
ON CREATE SET c2_2.summary = 'Hard-coded phone number used by the malware/app SMS functionality to receive stolen information.'
ON MATCH SET c2_2.summary = CASE WHEN c2_2.summary IS NULL OR c2_2.summary = '' THEN 'Hard-coded phone number used by the malware/app SMS functionality to receive stolen information.' ELSE c2_2.summary END
MERGE (mal_1)-[r_ab_2:abuses]->(c2_2)
ON CREATE SET r_ab_2.evidence = 'Stolen information is also sent to the attacker\'s hard-coded phone number used in SMS functionality.'
ON MATCH SET r_ab_2.evidence = CASE WHEN r_ab_2.evidence IS NULL OR r_ab_2.evidence = '' THEN 'Stolen information is also sent to the attacker\'s hard-coded phone number used in SMS functionality.' ELSE r_ab_2.evidence END

ON MATCH SET
  vict_1.sector = CASE WHEN vict_1.sector IS NULL OR vict_1.sector = '' THEN 'Finance' ELSE vict_1.sector END,

  vict_1.summary = CASE WHEN vict_1.summary IS NULL OR vict_1.summary = '' THEN 'Users targeted by a fake banking/KYC Android application impersonating a legitimate bank in India.' ELSE vict_1.summary END

MERGE (src1:Source {id:'CISA-FBI-Androxgh0st-Warning'})

ON CREATE SET mal1.family = 'Androxgh0st', mal1.summary = 'Python-scripted malware used to build a botnet focused on cloud credential theft; targets .env files (e.g., AWS, Microsoft Office 365, SendGrid, Twilio), scans/exploits RCE vulnerabilities, supports SMTP abuse and web shell deployment.'

CVE-2017-9841, CVE-2021-41773, and CVE-2018-15133... primarily used to target .env files... AWS, Microsoft Office 365, SendGrid, and Twilio... supports... abusing SMTP... and web shell deployment.'

MERGE (cve1)-[sbc1:supported_by]->(src1)
ON CREATE SET sbc1.page = '', sbc1.quote = '...vulnerable to the following remote code execution (RCE) vulnerabilities: CVE-2017-9841 (PHPUnit unit testing framework)...'
WITH src1, mal1

ON CREATE SET exp1.evidence = 'Scans for websites and servers vulnerable to RCE vulnerability CVE-2017-9841 (PHPUnit).', exp1.source_id = src1.id, exp1.page = ''

MERGE (cve_1:CVE {id:'CVE-2023-4969'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_1.summary = 'LeftoverLocals: a vulnerability affecting GPUs from AMD, Apple, Qualcomm, and Imagination Technologies that can allow retrieval of data from uninitialized local memory, enabling recovery of sensitive data from victim computations (including LLM/ML inputs, outputs, weights, and intermediate computations).'
ON MATCH SET
  cve_1.summary = CASE WHEN cve_1.summary IS NULL OR trim(cve_1.summary) = '' THEN 'LeftoverLocals: a vulnerability affecting GPUs from AMD, Apple, Qualcomm, and Imagination Technologies that can allow retrieval of data from uninitialized local memory, enabling recovery of sensitive data from victim computations (including LLM/ML inputs, outputs, weights, and intermediate computations).' ELSE cve_1.summary END

MERGE (tool_1:Tool {name:'LeftoverLocals listener'})
ON CREATE SET
  tool_1.summary = 'A GPU-kernel "listener" concept used to read from uninitialized local memory and dump recovered data to a persistent location (e.g., global memory) in the context of the LeftoverLocals vulnerability.'
ON MATCH SET
  tool_1.summary = CASE WHEN tool_1.summary IS NULL OR trim(tool_1.summary) = '' THEN 'A GPU-kernel "listener" concept used to read from uninitialized local memory and dump recovered data to a persistent location (e.g., global memory) in the context of the LeftoverLocals vulnerability.' ELSE tool_1.summary END

MERGE (tech_1:Technique {technique_id:'T1552'})
ON CREATE SET
  tech_1.name = 'Unsecured Credentials'
ON MATCH SET
  tech_1.name = CASE WHEN tech_1.name IS NULL OR trim(tech_1.name) = '' THEN 'Unsecured Credentials' ELSE tech_1.name END
SET tech_1.tactic = CASE WHEN tech_1.tactic IS NULL OR trim(tech_1.tactic) = '' THEN 'Credential Access' ELSE tech_1.tactic END,
    tech_1.summary = CASE WHEN tech_1.summary IS NULL OR trim(tech_1.summary) = '' THEN 'LeftoverLocals enables recovery of sensitive values left in GPU local memory (e.g., LLM/ML model inputs/outputs/weights), which constitutes harvesting sensitive information from memory.' ELSE tech_1.summary END

MERGE (tool_1)-[exploits_1:exploits]->(cve_1)

MERGE (tool_1)-[uses_tech_1:uses]->(tool_1)

MERGE (tool_1)-[supported_by_1:supported_by]->(cve_1)
